# UiHost.DeclinableUiRequests property

The set of UI-initiated requests that a host, when it declines them (for lack of consent, policy, or an unknown method), MUST answer with a §22 error rather than silently dropping (spec §26.8, R-26.8-b).

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyList<string> DeclinableUiRequests { get; }
```
